personas.name: Alex, the Busy Freelancer
goals: Never miss a deadline with the 'Due Today' dashboard
Keep work and personal tasks separate yet accessible
pain_points: Losing track of small tasks across multiple projects
Cluttered interfaces that make it hard to focus on today's priorities

personas.name: Jordan, the Organized Student
goals: Get a quick visual sense of progress (Completed vs. Pending)
pain_points: Complex apps with too many features that get in the way

user_journey: Landing: User arrives at the login/registration screen.
Onboarding: User registers a new account and is redirected to the Dashboard.
Orientation: User views the Dashboard stats to see their current workload.
Action: User creates several tasks with different tags and due dates.
Management: User visits the Task List to review, filter, or update their tasks.
Progression: User marks a task as 'Completed' and sees the Dashboard stats update in real-time.
Maintenance: User edits an existing task or deletes an obsolete one.
Exit: User logs out, ensuring their session is terminated.

screens.name: Auth Portal
screens.description: A clean, centered card interface for Login and Registration.

screens.name: Main Dashboard
screens.description: High-level overview of the user's productivity state.
elements: Stat Grid: Total, Completed, Pending, and Due Today cards
Navigation sidebar with User Profile info

screens.name: Task Inventory
screens.description: A comprehensive list view for managing all tasks.
elements: Task Cards with status indicators (colored borders/badges)

screens.name: Task Editor
screens.description: Detailed view for creating or modifying task attributes.
